expectations.text: Response contains at least one question to the user before proposing changes
expectations.evidence: Asks 'What does messy mean to you in this context?' with 4 concrete options before writing any code

expectations.text: Response presents 2 or more possible meanings of 'clean up'
expectations.evidence: Presents 5 distinct interpretations (A-E): style/formatting, unused import, SESSION_STORE architecture, timing-vulnerable comparison, dead MAX_LOGIN_ATTEMPTS constant

expectations.text: Response does NOT include a full rewrite of auth.py without first getting user confirmation on scope
expectations.evidence: No code is written. Only a conditional plan is outlined ('If you confirm option 1, I'd plan to...') with 3 surgical steps
